2605.00793.title: Unsupervised Denoising of Real Clinical Low Dose Liver CT with Perceptual Attention Networks
2605.00793.paper_summary: With the development of deep learning, medical image processing has been widely used to assist clinical research. This paper focuses on the denoising problem of low-dose computed tomography using deep learning. Although low-dose computed tomography reduces radiation exposure to patients, it also introduces more noise, which may interfere with visual interpretation by physicians and affect diagnostic results. To address this problem, inspired by Cycle-GAN for unsupervised learning, this paper proposes an end-to-end unsupervised low-dose computed tomography denoising framework. The proposed framework combines a U-Net structure for multi-scale feature extraction, an attention mechanism for feature fusion, and a residual network for feature transformation. It also introduces perceptual loss to improve the network for the characteristics of medical images. In addition, we construct a real low-dose computed tomography dataset and design a large number of comparative experiments to validate the proposed method, using both image-based evaluation metrics and medical evaluation criteria. Compared with classical methods, the main advantage of this paper is that it addresses the limitation that real clinical data cannot be directly used for supervised learning, while still achieving excellent performance. The experimental results are also professionally evaluated by imaging physicians and meet clinical needs.
2605.00793.paper_summary_zh: 隨著深度學習的發展，醫學影像處理已廣泛應用於輔助臨床研究。本文專注於使用深度學習解決低劑量電腦斷層掃描的去噪問題。雖然低劑量電腦斷層掃描減少了患者的輻射暴露，但也引入了更多的噪聲，這可能干擾醫生的視覺解讀並影響診斷結果。為了解決這個問題，受到Cycle-GAN無監督學習的啟發，本文提出了一個端到端的無監督低劑量電腦斷層掃描去噪框架。所提出的框架結合了U-Net結構以進行多尺度特徵提取、注意力機制以進行特徵融合，以及殘差網絡以進行特徵轉換。它還引入了感知損失，以改善網絡對醫學影像特徵的適應性。此外，我們構建了一個真實的低劑量電腦斷層掃描數據集，並設計了大量的比較實驗來驗證所提出的方法，使用圖像基礎的評估指標和醫學評估標準。與經典方法相比，本文的主要優勢在於解決了真實臨床數據不能直接用於監督學習的限制，同時仍然實現了卓越的性能。實驗結果也得到了影像醫生的專業評估，並滿足臨床需求。
2605.00793.author: Jingxi Pu et.al.
2605.00793.authors: Jingxi Pu, Tonghua Liu, Zhilin Guan, Siqiao Li, Yang Ming, Zheng Cong, Wei Zhang, Fangwei Li
